title.en: There are many legendary lords in the Holy Land...

content.en:
"Who is it?"

There are many legendary lords in the Holy Land, and they are all puzzled.

The person who spoke was obviously not a powerhouse of the True Unholy Land, otherwise he would not have used the title of your True Unholy Land.

And this is the headquarters of the True Unholy Land, and outsiders dare to break in.

Tear and pull!

The long river of time appeared, and a phantom appeared

This is a legendary realm lord who has crossed the long river of time in his incarnation and came to the True Void Holy Land.

"Weixing, it's you, you're not welcome here"

Long Gu said coldly.

"Hahaha, I heard that you really have no holy land to build the Bridge of Time, so come and take a look, can't old friends come and take a look?"

"It's him!"

Many of the legendary lords of the True Sacred Land recognized it.

The Lord of the Stars, the Lord of the Legendary Realm, is an existence that controls time.

The Trick Star Lord is the sworn enemy of the True Immortal Holy Land, the Legendary Realm Lord of the Infinite Sea Trick Star Tower, there are only two Legendary Realm Lords in the Trick Star Tower, and the strength is far inferior to the True Saintless Land, but the Trick Star Tower has joined forces with multiple Legend-level forces to form an alliance.

Therefore, even if there is really no holy land, he does not dare to tear his face directly with the Trick Star Tower, otherwise it is likely to be against the entire alliance behind the Trick Star Tower.

Many 08 years ago, in the Battle of the Infinite Sea, several Legendary Realm Lords fell to the True Infinite Holy Land, and those Legendary Realm Lords were all killed in battle with their bodies and clones, and they died completely.

One of them fell into the hands of the Star Lord and several other Legendary Realm Lords, so the Dragon Gu Lord hated the Lord of the Star Tower.

"Lord of the Tricky Star, if you want to see the excitement, as far as the real body is concerned, you don't even dare to come to the clone. Lord Longgu said sarcastically

"Hehe, I really don't dare, you really don't have a lot of powerhouses in the Holy Land, if I really come, I'm afraid I won't be able to leave. The owner of the Strange Star Mansion was self-aware and said.

"Get out!"

Lord Longgu snorted coldly.

Time shook, and the incarnation of the Star Lord directly shattered.

Immeasurable Sea, Strange Star Tower.

Seeing that his avatar had been destroyed, the Lord of the Tricky Star was not angry, it was just an incarnation, it was nothing.

"The True Saintless Land is really going to build the Bridge of Time, if it is really built, maybe there will be one more Legendary Realm Lord, which is not good for our Strange Star Tower!" muttered the Lord of the Strange Star Tower.

But he couldn't stop it, and he couldn't convince the entire alliance to go to war against the True Saintless Land.

After all, in the last big war, the entire alliance also suffered heavy losses.

The main reason is that so many Legendary Realm Lords have fallen, and now many Legendary Realm Lords are afraid and dare not fight anymore, for fear that the next person to die will be themselves.

After all, no one expected that the battle would be so tragic, and even the Legendary Realm Lord would be able to die so much

"It also takes a lot of time to maintain the Bridge of Time, and maybe a Legendary Realm Lord of the True Holy Land can't be born. "

The Lord of the Strange Star Mansion comforted himself.

......

The incarnation of the Lord of the Strange Star Mansion was destroyed, and the Lord of Longgu could no longer see the person he hated, so he continued to build the Bridge of Time.

Wow!

The long river of time emerged, and the Lord of Longgu took out a large number of materials, of which the main material was naturally Time Hengjin.

A large amount of materials fused with Time Constant Gold, and gradually turned into a purple bridge under the refining of the Dragon Ancient Lord.

The bridge was built under the river of time, which gradually stabilized the area, and at the other end was on the side of the Sacred Land.

Then, Lord Dragongu built the Temple of Time on this side of the Bridge of Time as the entrance to the Bridge of Time.

It was a long time before the Bridge of Time was fully built.

After the Bridge of Time was completed, Lord Longgu announced: "The Bridge of Time is completed, and all half-step Legendary Realm Lords can cultivate for 100 million eternal years in the long river of time, and there is no need for Legendary Lords under the half-step Legendary Realm to enter. "

Those Transcendental Realm Legendary Lords were very disappointed when they heard this, but they also felt that it was very normal, because the half-step Legendary Realm Lords could only gain a lot of benefits in the long river of time, while the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lords could actually obtain not many benefits.

And the Bridge of Time needs to protect the half-step Legendary Realm Lord, so the more Legendary Lords enter, the more Time Constant Gold will be consumed.

Therefore, it is impossible for all the Legendary Lords to enter the True Saintless Land, and it is only limited to the half-step Legendary Realm Lords.

Soon, one by one, the half-step Legendary Realm Lords crossed the Bridge of Time, entered the long river of time, and began their cultivation.

Ye Tian also wanted to enter the Long River of Time, but he was only a Realm Realm Legendary Lord, if he entered the Long River of Time, the others in the True Holy Land would definitely not be convinced, so it was impossible for the Dragon Gu Lord to let him in.

Ye Tian didn't think there was anything, the benefits he had obtained were enough, and by the time he entered the half-step legendary realm, he must have already controlled the time.

"The next thing is to cultivate more Eternal Dao and cultivate it to the Legendary Eternal Dao level. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Grey Mist Eternal Path is very powerful, and it is a bit difficult to step into the Legendary level, because it involves not only time, but also space, so it must be a little accomplished in space control before it can be promoted to the Legendary level.

Therefore, Ye Tian specifically looked for those Eternal Dao that involved more time.

For example, the Traceless Eternal Dao, the Evergreen Eternal Dao, the Eternal Eternal Dao, the Imperishable Eternal Dao......

These Eternal Dao are not weak, and there are corresponding Eternal Dao cultivation places in the True No Holy Land, and there are even special Eternal Treasures for the Legendary Lord to participate in and cultivate, but they cannot take away the Eternal Treasures.

It can be said that Ye Tian has no shortage of places to comprehend the Eternal Dao.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian has more and more eternal paths, and he is also handy in controlling time

After thousands of eternal years, Ye Tian's Immortal Eternal Dao took the lead in breaking through to the ranks of Legendary Eternal Dao 130 and became his first Legendary Eternal Dao.

After that, the other Eternal Dao also broke through to the legendary level one by one, and Ye Tian's strength became stronger and stronger.

At this time, Ye Tian would definitely not be without the power to resist when he faced the Purple Aurora Beast, which could be called invincible in the transcendent realm, maybe he still couldn't fight, but at least he could resist a few moves, so he retreated.

In addition to cultivating these Eternal Dao, Ye Tian also had a goal, that is, to raise his cultivation to the extreme of the Realm Realm Legendary Lord as soon as possible, and to cultivate the Will Rule Realm to the pinnacle, so as to impact the Will Rule Heaven and Earth.

And just like that, three million eternal years passed.

On this day, something big happened in the true unholy land.

After cultivating with the help of the long river of time, the Frostless Lord controlled the space in advance.

It stands to reason that the Frostless Lord's cultivation is to control the space, not time, and he cannot control the space in the long river of time, but the purpose of the Frostless Lord entering the long river of time is not to comprehend time, but to use space to fight against time, and temper his own control space from the confrontation.

In this way, the time can be shortened.

But this method can only be done if you are infinitely close to the control space, otherwise you will be looking for death.

However, after controlling the space, it is still very dangerous to attack the Legendary Realm Lord, mainly due to external factors

Therefore, Lord Longgu notified the other Legendary Realm Lords of the True Void Holy Land to protect the Dharma for the Lord of Frostless. _
